title: Paronychia weberbaueri

intro: Paronychia weberbaueri is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae, commonly known as the four o'clock flower. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Paronychia weberbaueri include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
